cross_cutting_principles: USER-REQ-1: Err on side of more CLs — token cost acceptable for accuracy
USER-REQ-2: Warnings not caps — user decides cost tradeoffs
USER-REQ-3: Step 0.5 CL agents should follow intent graph not just file list
process_compliance_notes: Cat8-A revised after user correction — CL scope should follow references outward not just PR files
Cat6-A revised after user feedback — warning not cap on claim count
Cat11-B revised after user feedback — add CL to Step 2, don't skip it
